CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products change s, the QuID is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections  or sub-sections have been updated.   The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Description 
ASCAT Advanced Scatterometer instrument 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
ECMWF European Centre for Medium-range Weather Forecasts 
ERA5 ECMWF Reanalysis version 5 
KNMI Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute 
L2 Level-2 (satellite data processing level) 
L3 Level-3 (satellite data processing level) 
L4 Level-4 (satellite data processing level) 
LSM Land-sea mask 
MARS Meteorological Archival and Retrieval System (ECMWF) 
Metop Meteorological Operational satellite 
MY Multi-year 
NRT Near Real Time 
NWP Numerical Weather Prediction 
OSI SAF Ocean and Sea Ice Satellite Application Facility 
PDF Probability distribution function 
REP Reprocessing 
SC Scatterometer correction 
SDD Standard deviation of the differences 
SST Sea Surface Temperature 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
U10S 10-m stress-equivalent wind 
VRMS vector root-mean-square 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
Zonal wind Eastward wind component, in west-east direction 
Meridional wind Northward wind component, in south-north direction 
Equivalent neutral 
wind 
Wind that would be observed under a neutral atmospheric 
stratification, i.e. corrected for air-mass stability  
Stress-equivalent 
wind 
Wind that would be observed in an atmosphere with a constant 
reference air density and neutral atmospheric stratification. This 
wind is more directly related to the surface winds derived from 
ocean surface roughness as measured by scatterometers

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for WIND_GLO_PHY_L4_NRT_012_004 and WIND_GLO_PHY_L4_MY_012_006 products, detailing their production process, quality control measures, and updates. It includes an acronym table, key definitions, change records, and relevant document lists.
